description: Style Note Casual dressing only gets better with these slip-on sandals from red tape. This pair is a great combination of style and functionality - they're a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence. Product Details Crisscrossing leather straps covering the midfoot and forefoot for durability, breathability and comfort Wide backfoot strap made of leather and attached to the forefoot strap with elastic inserts to lock the foot in place Padded fabric inner for a comfortable wear and to prevent blistering Stitch detailing on the upper for durability and style Cushioned suede footbed for all-day comfort Footbed stitched to the midsole for enhanced durability Durable rubber outsole with leaf midrib pattern lugs for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces Arched midfoot for ergonomic comfort Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
